name: Third party
overview: The events of the series revolve around three young people who stand in the face of their dreams, so fate increases in their determination to achieve them, and fate pushes them to meet the general, so he forms a team from them to regain the rights, and they discover that they only get the crumbs, so they decide to separate from the general and the conflict begins.

trailers.title: لأول مرة علي اليوتيوب مسلسل طرف تالت كامل ( بدون فواصل ) | 19 ساعة متواصل من الدراما 😯والأكشن
